# DESI BAO Measurements

## Source
- **Paper:** DESI Collaboration (2024), "DESI 2024 III: BAO from Galaxies and Quasars"
- **URL:** https://data.desi.lbl.gov/
- **Version:** DESI Year 1

## Notes
DESI provides the most precise BAO measurements to date. The Lya measurement at z=2.33 has particularly low model dependence.

## Citation
```bibtex
@article{DESI2024,
  author = {{DESI Collaboration}},
  title = {DESI 2024 III: Baryon Acoustic Oscillations from Galaxies and Quasars},
  journal = {arXiv},
  year = {2024},
  eprint = {2404.03002}
}
```
